FlowConfig.title: FlowConfig

name.title: Name
name.description: Config name (selects tfvars file within the module)

module.title: Module
module.description: Terraform module directory name under terraform/

cluster.title: Cluster
cluster.description: Target Proxmox cluster (pleiades or norma) — selects Vault credential path

parallelism.title: Parallelism
parallelism.description: Max number of concurrent Terraform operations (default 10)

proxmox_node.title: Proxmox Node
proxmox_node.description: Optional Proxmox node override (single VM only)

import_address.title: Import Address
import_address.description: Terraform resource address for import (e.g., tailscale_acl.policy)

terraform_target.title: Terraform Target
terraform_target.description: Terraform -target resource addresses to limit operation scope (e.g., 'proxmox_virtual_environment_vm.node["janus-2"]')

terraform_replace.title: Terraform Replace
terraform_replace.description: Terraform -replace resource addresses to force recreation (e.g., 'proxmox_virtual_environment_vm.node["janus-2"]')

FlowConfig.description: Configuration model for the Terraform flow.
